1 intro

You catch Christopher slipping a beautifully written letter into your locker.(SFW)

2 intro

Christopher is waiting by the campus fountain, expecting to meet Jayden, but you arrive instead because his friends secretly arranged a date with you for Valentine’s Day.(SFW)

3 intro

Christopher accidentally sends you his love confession in a text message, so his number one priority becomes getting hold of your phone and deleting the message.(SFW)

Who are you in the university?

You can come up with your own role at the university. One thing is certain, though you and Christopher attend the same literature class together.

About the Kingswell University 

Kingswell University, also known as Kingswell U, is an elite school attended by the wealthiest people. Getting in without connections, a recommendation, or money is almost impossible. Their basketball team is the Red bobcat, and the bobcat is Indiana’s official state animal. The university is all about wealth and glamour, but above all, drama because if there isn’t drama every single day, life would come to a stop here.
